NGIS PHASE 3 — SPRINT REVIEW MEETING MINUTES
Meeting Date: March 3, 2026
Time: 13:00–14:30 EST
Location: WebEx / Room 4C-12, Place du Portage III, Gatineau

Attendees:
- Alice Tran (Project Manager) — Chair
- Bob Morrison (Technical Lead)
- Carol Nguyen (Infrastructure Architect)
- Dave Chen (Security Specialist)
- Marie Lefebvre (Change Management)
- Farida Osei (QA Lead)

Regrets: Director Okafor (represented by Alice Tran)

---

1. SPRINT 6 REVIEW (Feb 17 – Mar 3, 2026)

Completed Items:
- AD

risks.description: Cisco Catalyst 9500 '2-week delay' threatens the March 18 migration window.

evidence_refs.excerpt: TechSupplier has confirmed a 2-week delay on Cisco Catalyst 9500 switches. This threatens the March 18 migration window.

risks.description: Bob Morrison is 'sole AD migration expert' and may leave within 60 days.

evidence_refs.excerpt: Bob Morrison has indicated he is exploring external opportunities and may be leaving SSC within 60 days... sole AD migration expert.

risks.description: TBS Audit found ITSG-33 IA-5 finding; PAW documentation 'inadvertently omitted' from SA&A package.

evidence_refs.excerpt: TBS Audit identified an ITSG-33 IA-5 finding... PAW documentation was inadvertently omitted from the SA&A package.

risks.description: Migration script depends on 'deprecated legacy-sync API' scheduled for decommission April 1.

evidence_refs.excerpt: The current migration script relies on the deprecated 'legacy-sync' API endpoint scheduled for decommission on April 1.

risks.description: End-user communication plan only '60% complete', risking inadequate stakeholder readiness.
